title: Thelysia alata
taxonomy: Thelysia alata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelysia. The Thelysia genus is part of the family Rubiaceae, which includes a diverse range of flowering plants. Thelysia alata is native to tropical Africa. The classification of this species is used in botany to identify and distinguish it from other related plant species.
